logistics.lodging_strategy: Book in Seia or Manteigas; event headquarters in Manteigas with post-race activities in Seia; options near Serra da Estrela Natural Park.[2][3]

final_verdict.one_liner: Portugal's toughest granfondo: epic climbs to Torre with stunning Serra da Estrela views.

youtube_data.search_query: Granfondo Serra da Estrela gran fondo cycling Seia

videos.title: Serra da Estrela (Torre) | Descent to Seia 🇵🇹 | 4K - 28/01/2023
Road bike 20km descent (FULL VID) - Serra de Estrela (Portugal) - Torre to Aldeia da Serra (Seia)
videos.description:
September 2017 - Route was from Torre (Serra de Estrela) in the direction to Seia - Portugal. It was a proper reward for a backbreaking 1000+ altitude climb to the top with approximately 2000 meters of altitude.  
Car traffic was moderate, max speed reached 66 km/h without pushing it to the max. The view was unreal and the weather was perfect with lower temperature, normal for 2k mountain temperature. I miscalculated my clothing and end up with a large non-aerodynamic jacket. Therefore speeds weren't even close to optimal ones. Planning to improve it next time!
